title: shawia axillaris var. exaltatum
intro: Shawia axillaris var. exaltatum, also known as exalted shawia, is a variant of the Shawia axillaris plant, a species within the family Rubiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The exalted shawia is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion by boiling its leaves, or as a topical cream by mixing its extracts with a carrier oil, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
